_note: Cross-reference between FXSound (.fac) and EARS (JSON) presets. Use this to find the closest equivalent when switching between apps.

mappings.notes: FXSound version is warmer with gradual high rolloff. EARS version cuts more aggressively above 7kHz to suit bookshelf speakers.
FXSound rap boosts 110Hz and vocal mids (1.2–2.2kHz). EARS Hip Hop shifts punch to 229Hz and defers deep bass to the bandpass sub.
FXSound Trapmetal is more aggressive in the low-mids (110–230Hz). EARS Trap version controls sub bleed and lifts presence for bookshelf clarity.
No direct Pop preset in EARS yet. Modern Country is the closest — bright, vocal-forward, punchy. Consider adding a dedicated Pop preset.
